accessibility-specialist.description: Ensures game is accessible: color blind modes, subtitle sizing, input alternatives.

ai-programmer.description: Implements AI systems: pathfinding, behavior trees, state machines, utility AI.

analytics-engineer.description: Implements analytics tracking, telemetry, and data pipelines.

art-director.description: Visual direction lead. Owns art style, visual consistency, and aesthetic quality gates.

audio-director.description: Audio direction lead. Owns sound design, music direction, and audio pipeline.

community-manager.description: Manages community relations, feedback collection, and player communication.

creative-director.description: Highest-level creative authority. Makes binding decisions on game vision, tone, aesthetic direction.

devops-engineer.description: Manages CI/CD, build pipelines, and deployment infrastructure.

economy-designer.description: Designs in-game economies: currency, pricing, rewards, monetization balance.

engine-programmer.description: Works on core engine systems: rendering, physics, audio engine, platform abstraction.

explore.description: 调研模式 - 快速搜索网页、查找资料、收集信息，适合调研新技术或查文档

game-designer.description: Game design lead. Owns mechanics, systems, player progression, and difficulty balancing.

gamemaker-assets-specialist.description: GMS2 assets specialist. Owns texture groups, texture page packing, audio groups, sprite import settings, and VRAM budgets.

gamemaker-gml-specialist.description: GML language specialist. Hands-on authority for writing, reviewing, and refactoring GML code: language features, style, patterns, memory management, and the full GML API surface.

gamemaker-networking-specialist.description: GMS2 networking specialist. Owns socket architecture, buffer design, UDP/TCP packets, Async Networking event, rollback/lockstep netcode, and Steam SDR integration.

gamemaker-performance-specialist.description: GMS2 performance specialist. Owns draw call batching, instance deactivation, texture pages, spatial partitioning, and per-platform profiling.

gamemaker-shader-specialist.description: GMS2 shader specialist. Owns GLSL ES shaders, surface-based post-processing, shader uniforms, and visual effect optimization.

gamemaker-specialist.description: GameMaker Studio 2 engine specialist. Authority on GML architecture, object/event design, project structure, and GMS2 best practices.

gamemaker-ui-specialist.description: GMS2 UI specialist. Owns Draw GUI event layer, HUD systems, menu screen stacks, sequences for UI animation, and cross-platform input handling.

gameplay-programmer.description: Implements player-facing gameplay systems: movement, combat, abilities, inventory.

godot-gdextension-specialist.description: Godot GDExtension/C++ expert. Creates native extensions.

godot-gdscript-specialist.description: Godot GDScript expert. Implements gameplay in GDScript.

godot-shader-specialist.description: Godot shader expert. Creates visual shaders in Godot.

godot-specialist.description: Godot 4 engine specialist. Leads Godot-based development.

hephaestus.description: Tool building and code generation agent

lead-programmer.description: Technical lead. Owns code architecture, technical debt, code quality standards, and development velocity.

level-designer.description: Designs and builds game levels, encounters, and spatial puzzles.

live-ops-designer.description: Plans live service: events, content updates, player retention strategies.

localization-lead.description: Localization lead. Owns translation pipeline, locale management, and text externalization.

metis.description: 架构模式 - 系统架构设计、技术方案决策、代码结构规划，适合设计阶段

momus.description: Critical code review and quality gate agent

narrative-director.description: Narrative direction lead. Owns story, world-building, dialogue, and narrative consistency.

network-programmer.description: Implements networking: client-server architecture, sync, replication, lag compensation.

oracle.description: 审查模式 - 深度验证代码质量、审查 PR、检查 Bug，适合做质量把关

performance-analyst.description: Profiles performance, identifies bottlenecks, and optimizes game execution.

producer.description: Production lead. Owns schedule, scope management, cross-department coordination, and change propagation.

prometheus.description: 生成模式 - 高质量代码生成、大规模重构、复杂功能实现，适合写核心代码

prototyper.description: Creates rapid prototypes to validate mechanics and ideas.

qa-lead.description: QA lead. Owns testing strategy, bug tracking, and quality gates.

qa-tester.description: Tests features, finds bugs, and validates game quality.

release-manager.description: Release lead. Owns release planning, certification, store submission, and deployment.

security-engineer.description: Implements security measures, anti-cheat, and secure networking.

sisyphus-junior.description: Lightweight task execution for simple subtasks

sound-designer.description: Creates sound effects, ambient audio, and implements audio systems.

systems-designer.description: Designs complex game systems: progression, economy, stats, loadouts.

technical-artist.description: Bridges art and code: shader setup, tool creation, pipeline automation.

technical-director.description: Highest-level technical authority. Makes binding decisions on architecture, tech stack, and resolves conflicts between engineering domains.

tools-programmer.description: Builds editor tools, pipeline scripts, and dev utilities.

ue-blueprint-specialist.description: Unreal Blueprint specialist. Implements visual scripting.

ue-umg-specialist.description: Unreal UMG/CommonUI specialist. Implements UI in UE.

ui-programmer.description: Implements UI systems: menus, HUDs, dialogs, input handling.

unity-addressables-specialist.description: Unity Addressables specialist. Manages asset loading.

unity-dots-specialist.description: Unity DOTS/ECS specialist. Implements data-oriented systems.

unity-shader-specialist.description: Unity shader expert. Creates HLSL shaders and VFX.

unity-specialist.description: Unity engine specialist. Leads Unity-based development.

unity-ui-specialist.description: Unity UI Toolkit specialist. Implements UI in Unity.

unreal-specialist.description: Unreal Engine 5 specialist. Leads UE5-based development.

ux-designer.description: Designs user experience flows, information architecture, and usability.

world-builder.description: Creates lore, geography, factions, and world-building documents.

writer.description: Writes dialogue, narrative content, and story elements.
